languages.text: {n}Изумление сменяется раскатистым хохотом.{/n} "Отрезвляющая честность, {name}! Если машина не выполняет свою функцию, то ее должно починить. Я упал в пучину чувств и сомнений, не посмотрев на ситуацию прагматично. Ведь для вас я инструмент. Да, вы не дадите мне просто так уйти. А значит я могу двигаться только вперед. Мне придется рискнуть просто потому что у меня нет выбора".

{n}Shock is replaced by peals of laughter.{/n} "Sobering honesty, {name}! If a machine does not fulfil its function, it should be repaired. I fell into an abyss of emotion and doubt, failing to consider the situation pragmatically. After all, to you, I am a tool. Of course you will not let me just walk away. Which means I can only move forward. I will have to take the risk simply because I have no other choice."
languages.original_text: {n}Изумление сменяется раскатистым хохотом.{/n} "Отрезвляющая честность, {name}! Если машина не выполняет свою функцию, то ее должно починить. Я упал в пучину чувств и сомнений, не посмотрев на ситуацию прагматично. Ведь для вас я инструмент. Да, вы не дадите мне просто так уйти. А значит я могу двигаться только вперед. Мне придется рискнуть просто потому что у меня нет выбора".

Which means I can only move forward. I will have to take the risk simply because I have no other choice."

languages.text: {n}El espanto da paso a una sonora carcajada.{/n} «¡Una sinceridad refrescante, {name}! Si una máquina no funciona adecuadamente, es necesario repararla. Me había sumido en un abismo de emociones y dudas al no pensar en la situación de forma pragmática. A fin de cuentas, para usted soy solo una herramienta. Claro que no me dejará ir sin más. Y eso significa que solo puedo seguir adelante. Debo correr el riesgo, aunque solo sea porque no me deja alternativa».
languages.original_text: {n}Shock is replaced by peals of laughter.{/n} "Sobering honesty, {name}! If a machine does not fulfil its function, it should be repaired. I fell into an abyss of emotion and doubt, failing to consider the situation pragmatically. After all, to you, I am a tool. Of course you will not let me just walk away. Which means I can only move forward. I will have to take the risk simply because I have no other choice."

traits.locale_text: {n}El espanto da paso a una sonora carcajada.{/n} «¡Una sinceridad refrescante, {name}! Si una máquina no funciona adecuadamente, es necesario repararla. Me había sumido en un abismo de emociones y dudas al no pensar en la situación de forma pragmática. A fin de cuentas, para usted soy solo una herramienta. Claro que no me dejará ir sin más. Y eso significa que solo puedo seguir adelante. Debo correr el riesgo, aunque solo sea porque no me deja alternativa».

languages.text: {n}震惊化为一阵大笑。{/n}“真是坦率的诚实，大人！如果一台机器无法履行它的职责，就应该被修理。我陷入了情感和疑虑的深渊，竟未能务实地考虑情况。毕竟，对您来说，我只是一件工具。您当然不会轻易让我离开。这意味着我只能前进。我必须承担风险，而这仅仅是因为我别无选择。”
languages.original_text: {n}Shock is replaced by peals of laughter.{/n} "Sobering honesty, {name}! If a machine does not fulfil its function, it should be repaired. I fell into an abyss of emotion and doubt, failing to consider the situation pragmatically. After all, to you, I am a tool. Of course you will not let me just walk away. Which means I can only move forward. I will have to take the risk simply because I have no other choice."

traits.locale_text: {n}震惊化为一阵大笑。{/n}“真是坦率的诚实，大人！如果一台机器无法履行它的职责，就应该被修理。我陷入了情感和疑虑的深渊，竟未能务实地考虑情况。毕竟，对您来说，我只是一件工具。您当然不会轻易让我离开。这意味着我只能前进。我必须承担风险，而这仅仅是因为我别无选择。”

languages.text: {n}D'abord choqué, Eogunn finit par éclater de rire.{/n} « Votre franchise remet les pendules à l'heure, {name} ! Si une machine ne remplit pas son rôle, il faut la réparer. Je me suis enfoncé dans un abîme d'émotion et de doute, sans envisager la situation de manière pragmatique. Après tout, je ne suis qu'un outil pour vous. Il est évident que vous n'allez pas me laisser partir de bon gré, ce qui signifie que je peux seulement aller de l'avant. Je vais devoir prendre ce risque, pour la simple et bonne raison que je n'ai pas le choix. »
languages.original_text: {n}Shock is replaced by peals of laughter.{/n} "Sobering honesty, {name}! If a machine does not fulfil its function, it should be repaired. I fell into an abyss of emotion and doubt, failing to consider the situation pragmatically. After all, to you, I am a tool. Of course you will not let me just walk away. Which means I can only move forward. I will have to take the risk simply because I have no other choice."

Je vais devoir prendre ce risque, pour la simple et bonne raison que je n'ai pas le choix. »

languages.text: {n}Şok, yerini kahkahalara bırakıyor.{/n} "Ayıltıcı bir dürüstlük! Eğer bir makine işlevini yerine getirmiyorsa onarılmalıdır. Durumu pragmatik şekilde değerlendiremeyerek bir duygu ve şüphe uçurumuna düştüm. Ne de olsa ben bir araçtan ibaretim. Elbette öylece çekip gitmeme izin verilemez. Bu da sadece ilerleyebileceğim anlamına geliyor. Risk almak zorundayım çünkü başka seçeneğim yok."
languages.original_text: {n}Shock is replaced by peals of laughter.{/n} "Sobering honesty, {name}! If a machine does not fulfil its function, it should be repaired. Bu da sadece ilerleyebileceğim anlamına geliyor. Risk almak zorundayım çünkü başka seçeneğim yok."

languages.text: {n}Schock weicht schallendem Gelächter.{/n} "Ernüchternde Ehrlichkeit, {name}! Wenn eine Maschine ihre Funktion nicht erfüllt, sollte sie repariert werden. Ich fiel in einen Abgrund der Gefühle und Zweifel und konnte die Situation nicht pragmatisch bewerten. Im Grunde bin ich für Euch nur ein Werkzeug. Ihr lasst mich natürlich nicht einfach gehen. Mir bleibt also nichts anderes übrig, als weiterzumachen. Ich muss das Risiko eingehen, weil ich keine andere Wahl habe."
languages.original_text: {n}Shock is replaced by peals of laughter.{/n} "Sobering honesty, {name}! If a machine does not fulfil its function, it should be repaired. Which means I can only move forward. I will have to take the risk simply because I have no other choice."

languages.text: {n}衝撃が笑いに変わる。{/n}"しみじみとした正直さ、{name} ！機械がその機能を果たさないなら、修理すべきだ。私は感情と疑念の淵に落ち、状況を現実的に考えることを怠った。結局のところ、あなたにとって私は道具なのだ。もちろん、あなたは私をこのまま見捨てることはできない。ということは、私は前に進むしかない。他に選択肢がないのだから、私はリスクを負わなければならない"
languages.original_text: {n}Shock is replaced by peals of laughter.{/n} "Sobering honesty, {name}! If a machine does not fulfil its function, it should be repaired. I fell into an abyss of emotion and doubt, failing to consider the situation pragmatically. After all, to you, I am a tool. Of course you will not let me just walk away. Which means I can only move forward. I will have to take the risk simply because I have no other choice."
